Growth & Acquisition, Week of Apr 21
Paid ROAS holding at 4.2x across search, up from 3.8x last week. Activation rate hit 38%, up 4pts month-over-month — best since December.
Growth & Acquisition Update for the Week of April 21
This week, we are excited to report that our Paid Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) has shown remarkable strength, now standing at an impressive 4.2x in search. This marks a significant increase from last week's figure of 3.8x, indicating that our advertising strategies are effectively resonating with our target audience. Additionally, our activation rate has reached 38%, which is a notable rise of 4 points compared to last month. This is particularly encouraging as it represents the highest activation rate we have seen since December, showcasing our ongoing efforts to enhance user engagement and conversion.

Cookie Preferences
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests an

When we optimize, you save $

Cookie Preferences
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

integrations.title: ClickUp™ | Integrations
integrations.text:
ClickUp™ | Integrations
Brain AI
Product
Solutions
Learn
Pricing
Enterprise
Get a Demo
Login
Sign Up
Connect over 1,000+ tools to ClickUp for free
Welcome to the future of productivity, where useful features and integrations are shipped to you weekly.
Start integrating
<
Enter terms to filter:
Filter
Native integrations
Automatic Import
More Integrations
Native integrations
Built by ClickUp, loved by everyone.
ClickUp API
Build custom ClickUp integrations and apps using the public API for tailored automation and data synchronization.
Slack
Create and update ClickUp Tasks from Slack messages, unfurl links with rich details and actions, and receive real-time task updates in Slack channels.
GitHub
Sync commits, branches, pull requests, and issues between GitHub and ClickUp to track development progress without switching tools.
Zapier
Automate workflows between ClickUp and thousands of apps by setting triggers and actions, no coding required.
GitLab
Link GitLab commits, branches, pull requests, and issues with ClickUp Tasks for real-time visibility and streamlined development.
Webhooks
Send real-time ClickUp data to external apps and services by triggering automated workflows through Webhooks.
HubSpot
Sync CRM data, tickets, and properties between ClickUp and HubSpot to track pipeline progress and manage projects seamlessly.
Everhour
Track time on ClickUp Tasks, generate reports, and manage budgets with Everhour’s integrated time-tracking.
Toggl
Log time directly from ClickUp Tasks using Toggl, ensuring accurate tracking and reporting across projects.
Harvest
Connect ClickUp with Harvest to track time spent on Tasks and sync logged hours for invoicing and reporting.
Google Drive
Attach, search, and preview Google Drive files directly in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat for seamless file access.
OneDrive
Attach and manage OneDrive files within ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat to keep project assets organized.
Dropbox
Embed and preview Dropbox files in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat, keeping work files easily accessible.
Outlook
Convert Outlook emails into ClickUp Tasks or create new Tasks without leaving your inbox.
Google Calendar
Sync ClickUp Tasks with Google Calendar to manage schedules, track deadlines, and update events in real time.
Sync with Calendars
Enable one-way sync to automatically update Apple and Outlook calendars with ClickUp Tasks.
SSO
Log in to ClickUp securely using Google, Microsoft, or Okta accounts for simplified access management.
Figma
Embed interactive Figma prototypes in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat for real-time design collaboration.
Vimeo
Embed Vimeo videos in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat to review and share video content seamlessly.
YouTube
Paste YouTube links in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat to embed and watch videos directly in your Workspace.
Loom
Embed Loom screen recordings in ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat to share updates and feedback instantly.
Zoom
Start and join Zoom meetings from ClickUp Tasks, Docs, and Chat with automatic meeting details and recordings.
Bitbucket
Sync Bitbucket commits, branches, and pull requests with ClickUp Tasks for better visibility into development work.
Chrome
Create ClickUp Tasks, capture screenshots, and save emails from Gmail and Outlook using ClickUp’s Chrome extension.
Sentry
Convert Sentry error reports into ClickUp Tasks, ensuring developers can track and resolve bugs efficiently.
Microsoft Teams
Sync ClickUp with Microsoft Teams to create tasks, receive updates, automate meeting notes, and collaborate in real time.
Google Hangouts Chat
Get real-time ClickUp Task notifications directly in Google Chat to keep project updates visible.
Intercom
Create and link ClickUp tasks directly from Intercom conversations to streamline customer support workflows.
Box
Attach Box files to ClickUp tasks and Docs to centralize document management and collaboration.
Zendesk
Link, create, and track ClickUp Tasks from Zendesk tickets to align customer support with project execution.
Front
Connect ClickUp with Front to create, link, and manage support tickets and tasks in one Workspace.
Clockify
Track time on ClickUp tasks using Clockify and sync data for better time management and reporting.
Timely
Automatically track time on ClickUp tasks with Timely's AI engine, linking logged hours to tasks for accurate reporting.
TMetric
Use the TMetric Chrome extension to track time spent on ClickUp tasks and optimize workload distribution.
Timeneye
Track time on ClickUp Tasks using Timeneye and sync data for accurate billing and reporting.
PomoDone
Use the Pomodoro technique to track time on ClickUp Tasks and stay focused with structured work intervals.
TimeCamp
Sync TimeCamp with ClickUp to track time, generate invoices, and analyze reports for better project insights.
Time Doctor
Monitor productivity by tracking time on ClickUp tasks with Time Doctor’s desktop and browser app.
LambdaTest
Perform automated and live browser testing with LambdaTest and log bug reports as ClickUp tasks.
DueFocus
Report tracked time directly from DueFocus into ClickUp tasks for accurate project insights.
Twilio
Automate SMS notifications from ClickUp tasks using Twilio, dynamically inserting custom field data.
Bugsnag
Sync Bugsnag error alerts with ClickUp tasks to track and resolve application bugs efficiently.
Calendly
Automatically create ClickUp Tasks from new Calendly events, capturing meeting details in one place.
Miro
Embed Miro whiteboards in ClickUp tasks, Docs, and Chat for real-time brainstorming and planning.
Discord
Send ClickUp notifications to Discord channels to keep teams updated on project changes.
Tableau Web Connector
Sync ClickUp data with Tableau to create dynamic dashboards for real-time reporting.
Giphy
Insert Giphy images in ClickUp Docs and comments to enhance team communication.
Automatic import from other tools
Migrate to ClickUp in minutes. Bring everything over with just a few clicks!
Asana Import
Import tasks, projects, and attachments from Asana into ClickUp in minutes—no data left behind. Keep your entire workflow in one place and customize exactly what you bring over.
Trello Import
Bring your Trello boards, cards, and due dates into ClickUp with just a few clicks. Enjoy advanced features while keeping all your tasks intact.
Todoist Import
Import tasks from Todoist—complete with due dates and priority levels. Manage them all in ClickUp, alongside powerful automation and collaboration.
Jira Import
Migrate your Jira issues, sprints, and epics into ClickUp seamlessly. Keep dev teams aligned with no data lost in the transition.
Monday.com Import
Move your Monday.com boards to ClickUp in one go—tasks, owners, and statuses included. Get more done with more powerful tools, flexible features, and an AI-powered Workspace that adapts to your needs.
Basecamp Import
Import your Basecamp to-dos, discussions, and files into ClickUp. Keep context and tasks together for streamlined collaboration.
Wrike Import
Transfer tasks, folders, and user assignments from Wrike into ClickUp in a snap. Centralize your workflow and unlock more advanced tools, flexible features, and AI-powered insights and automation.
Confluence Import
Import Confluence pages into ClickUp Docs for centralized knowledge management and AI-powered Connected Search.
Third-party integrations
Connect ClickUp to 1,000+ tools with integrations built by other companies.
OpenAI
OpenAI's ChatGPT can tap into your ClickUp workspace to give you AI-powered insights about your tasks, projects, and conversations.
Grammarly
Get grammar suggestions and spelling checks in any ClickUp text field.
Unito
Sync ClickUp with Jira, Trello, HubSpot, and more—enabling real-time updates across teams and departments.
Canny
Connect Canny posts to ClickUp tasks to inform your roadmap and automatically update customers on feature status.
Shift
Use Shift to navigate between your ClickUp tasks, email, calendars, and drive accounts—all in one desktop client.
CloudApp
Create visual explanations and insert them into ClickUp task descriptions, comments, and more in seconds.
Make
Connect ClickUp with hundreds of apps to automate your workflows—no coding required.
SupportBee
Manage product support requests and help tickets in SupportBee, then sync them seamlessly to ClickUp.
EasyInsight
Generate grids, pivot tables, charts, and tree reports with your ClickUp data—drilling down from Spaces to the tasks that matter most.
Station
Unify all your work apps in a single interface, eliminating countless browser tabs and letting you switch between them quickly.
Protractor plugin
Use the clickup-protractor-plugin to integrate test reporting into your team’s workflow by linking tests directly to ClickUp tasks.
Asana
Sync tasks from Asana to ClickUp for more powerful project management across your teams.
Basecamp
Bring tasks from Basecamp into ClickUp, unifying your project management in one place.
Trello
Automatically send new Trello cards to ClickUp so your tasks stay in one place.
Jira
Create new tasks in ClickUp whenever an issue is created in Jira with a specific tag—keeping teams aligned.
Monday
Sync pulses from Monday to ClickUp, creating tasks automatically and streamlining your project management.
Google Sheets
Export ClickUp data to Google Sheets automatically for quick analysis and reporting.
Ring Central
Automatically create tasks in ClickUp for each missed RingCentral call, ensuring timely follow-ups.
Evernote
Convert Evernote notes into ClickUp tasks, so you can organize and track them more effectively.
Google Forms
Turn new Google Form submissions into ClickUp tasks, streamlining your intake process.
Helpscout
Automatically create tasks in ClickUp for new Help Scout conversations, bridging customer support and task management.
Typeform
Convert new Typeform entries into ClickUp tasks to capture details accurately and follow up promptly.
Intercom
Create a ClickUp task whenever a lead becomes a new user in Intercom, ensuring client details are recorded and addressed.
Salesforce
Automatically create ClickUp tasks for new Salesforce opportunities, helping you follow up faster and close more deals.
Zoho Flow
Integrate ClickUp with 300+ apps—no code required. Automate repetitive tasks so you can focus on what matters.
Userback
Send visual website feedback directly into ClickUp tasks, eliminating manual copying and pasting.
Slab
Embed ClickUp tasks in Slab to view titles, statuses, and descriptions—track tags and due dates without leaving Slab.
WebWork Time Tracker
Track time on ClickUp tasks with WebWork to keep projects on schedule and boost productivity.
Airtable
Bring your Airtable bases into ClickUp to collaborate on data alongside your tasks.
Hubstaff
Track time on ClickUp tasks with Hubstaff, automate business processes, and improve productivity.
Memtime
Memtime automatically tracks your time in all programs and displays your workday, helping you accurately log every minute.
Pabbly Connect
Automate your ClickUp workflows with Pabbly Connect. Create triggers, add filters, and map fields—no coding needed.
Marker.io
Capture your screen, add visual annotations, and report issues in ClickUp—all directly from your website.
Integrately
Connect ClickUp with 300+ apps to automate cross-app communication and simple workflows in a breeze.
n8n
Use n8n’s open, fair-code workflow automation to connect ClickUp with any app you need.
Monitask
A 5-in-1 remote time-tracking toolkit that helps teams monitor productivity and stay efficient in ClickUp.
TestLodge
Automatically create ClickUp tasks for failed tests with TestLodge, giving developers all the details they need to fix issues.
Sunsama
Plan your day with Sunsama and ClickUp. Browse tasks by Space or Folder, drag them into your schedule, and automate your workflow.
ProBackup
Secure your ClickUp data with daily, automated backups of Spaces, tasks, and files.
SaveMyLeads
Automatically create tasks, Lists, or Folders in ClickUp from new Facebook leads—no manual data entry required.
PractiTest
Manage your QA efforts in real-time with PractiTest. Sync and report tasks between PractiTest and ClickUp for seamless test coverage.
Merge.dev
Use Merge.dev’s unified API to read and write data across ClickUp and other project management tools on behalf of your users.
Sleekplan
Sync user feedback and status updates with ClickUp by creating tasks directly from your Sleekplan dashboard.
Jotform
Collect project info, accept payments, and automate workflows in ClickUp with Jotform.
Morgen
Time block ClickUp tasks on any calendar, protect time for your priorities, and sync tracking back to ClickUp.
Aikido
Consolidate nine security scanners into one platform with Aikido Security. Track and resolve vulnerabilities directly in ClickUp.
Relay
Automate your ClickUp tasks with Relay.app, a flexible platform offering deep integrations and advanced workflow features.
Timing
Automatically import your ClickUp tasks and track your time spent. Timing syncs logs back to ClickUp and shows when tasks are completed.
Rize
Rize is an automatic time tracker that helps you track clients and projects so you can stay in flow and move faster.
Unthread
Sync ClickUp tasks with Unthread's AI-native helpdesk that tracks and automatically resolves issues from Slack & Teams.
Screenful
Instant Analytics and Automated Reports for ClickUp, Linear, GitHub, and more.
Custom Integrations
Embed web apps or build your own integration with ClickUp's API
Connect any tool with ClickUp’s Open API or simply embed a web app inside ClickUp with Embed View.
ClickUp API
Customizable integrations
Connect any tool with ClickUp’s Open API. Embed, sync, and automate workflows with custom integrations that fit your needs.
Learn more
Embed View
Embed web apps
Integrate over 50 external apps into your Workspace with Embed View—embed popular tools like Google Maps, YouTube, and Salesforce dashboards right alongside your tasks, so you can save time and minimize context switching.
Learn more
One platform. 1,000

hits.title: Show HN: I built my own PM tool after trying Trello, Asana, ClickUp, etc.
Show HN: Making a cool ClickUp/Asana alternative
Ask HN: How can a product like ClickUp grow so fast (or even grow at all)?
Clickup.com page source contains hardcoded Split.io API key – data leak
How did ClickUp grow in an already saturated market?

analysis.name: ClickUp
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one work platform combining projects, chat, docs, and AI agents to replace fragmented SaaS stacks and maximize productivity.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional teams and mid-market companies looking to consolidate multiple SaaS tools (Slack, Asana, Notion, Jira, Loom, etc.) into a single productivity platform with AI agents.

features.name: tasks
features.description: Unlimited task management as the core work unit

features.name: projects
features.description: Project management with hierarchies of spaces, folders, and lists

features.name: custom-statuses
features.evidence_quote: create custom task statuses to match your workflow

features.name: custom-fields
features.description: Custom fields on tasks; basic on free, unlimited on paid

features.name: gantt-charts
features.description: Gantt chart view for project timelines

features.name: whiteboards
features.description: Collaborative whiteboards with private option on Business

features.name: chat
features.description: In-workspace team chat with channels and DMs

features.name: emails
features.description: Send and receive email inside ClickUp

features.name: forms
features.evidence_quote: 1 Form / Unlimited Spaces, Folders, and Forms

features.name: automations
features.description: No-code workflow automation with monthly quota

features.name: api
features.description: Public REST API for building integrations
features.evidence_quote: Build custom ClickUp integrations and apps using the public API

features.name: mcp-server
features.description: MCP protocol support for AI agent integration

features.name: brain-ai
features.description: Native AI assistant across chat, tasks, and docs

features.name: brain-max
features.description: Multi-model AI desktop client (GPT, Claude, Gemini)

features.name: super-agents
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that execute work across tools

features.name: ambient-agents
features.description: Ambient AI that surfaces context and suggestions proactively

features.name: ai-qa
features.description: AI question answering over workspace content

features.name: enterprise-search
features.description: Federated search across workspace and connected apps

features.name: deep-search
features.description: Deep search across workspace, apps, and web
features.evidence_quote: Ask something complex. Brain² checks your workspace, apps, and the web

features.name: connected-search
features.description: Search across connected third-party apps via MCP
features.evidence_quote: Brain² taps Google Drive, GitHub, Salesforce

features.name: ai-multi-model
features.description: Choose between Claude, GPT, and Gemini in one subscription

features.name: ai-super-credits
features.description: Metered credit system for AI usage

features.name: certified-agents
features.description: Verified pre-built AI agents by ClickUp

features.name: message-history
features.description: Unlimited chat message history on Business

features.name: data-export
features.description: Export list/table views to CSV or Excel
features.evidence_quote: Export List and Table views as a CSV or Excel file

features.name: unlimited-storage
features.description: Unlimited file storage on paid plans (60MB on Free)

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on via Google, Microsoft, or Okta
features.evidence_quote: Log in to ClickUp securely using Google, Microsoft, or Okta

features.name: custom-roles
features.description: Unlimited custom user roles for enterprise

features.name: clickup-assist
features.description: Live expert AI setup and support add-on

features.name: chrome-extension
features.description: Chrome extension for capture and task creation
features.evidence_quote: Create ClickUp Tasks, capture screenshots, and save emails from Gmail and Outlook

features.name: automatic-import
features.description: One-click migration from Asana, Trello, Jira, and others
features.evidence_quote: Migrate to ClickUp in minutes. Bring everything over with just a few clicks!

features.name: my-tasks-page
features.description: Personalized home canvas with customizable cards
features.evidence_quote: The My Tasks page features a canvas that allows you to add specific cards

differentiators: One app to replace all software (Slack, Google Drive, Salesforce, Loom, etc.)
The world's first company Brain — multiplayer AI that learns team preferences
Every frontier AI model (GPT, Claude Opus, Gemini) in one subscription with full workspace context
Super Agents — autonomous AI that executes work across every team, app, and workflow
Super Fair Billing — pass through AI cost savings to customers
Advertised cost savings: $282,000/year for a 500-person company vs. app sprawl

recent_ships.what: Brain² — rebuilt AI with memory, preferences, and multiplayer intelligence
recent_ships.source: landing: 'NEW: Brain² — The best AI is your AI'
landing: 'Introducing Super Agents — AI that actually showed up to work'

recent_ships.what: Brain MAX desktop AI app with multi-model support
Enterprise Search across workspace and connected apps via MCP
MCP server support for third-party AI clients

praised: All-in-one consolidation reduces tool sprawl and cost
Aggressive shipping cadence — 'features and integrations shipped weekly'
Rapid growth in a saturated PM market suggests real traction
complaints: HN: '22% Layoff at ClickUp' — signals cost pressure or over-hiring
HN: 'Clickup.com page source contains hardcoded Split.io API key – data leak' — security incident concern
HN skepticism: 'How can a product like ClickUp grow so fast (or even grow at all)?' — questions about product quality behind growth
Users building alternatives after trying ClickUp — 'I built my own PM tool after trying Trello, Asana, ClickUp, etc.' (632 upvotes)

free_tier.limits: 60MB storage, 1 form, basic custom fields; unlimited tasks and free members

tiers.name: Free Forever
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited tasks/members, 60MB storage, Kanban, Calendar, Docs, 2FA, 24/7 support

tiers.name: Unlimited
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited storage, Gantt, integrations, custom fields, time tracking, goals, chat

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dashboards, 5K automations/mo, mind maps, Google SSO, sprint points, proofing

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: SAML SSO, SCIM, audit log, custom roles, HIPAA, data residency, 250K automations/mo, CSM

tiers.name: Brain AI (add-on) Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Trial access to advanced AI across chat, tasks, docs

tiers.name: Brain AI (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited Brain Assistant, @Brain Agent, AI chat/writing, multi-model, 1,500 credits/mo

tiers.name: Everything AI (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full agentic suite: Notetaker, AI Fields, Automations, Image Gen, 5,000 credits/mo

tiers.name: AI Super Credits
tiers.headline_inclusions: $10 per 10,000 credits ($0.001/credit) — fuels agents, AI fields, automations, image gen

tiers.name: ClickUp Assist
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 hours 1:1 expert AI setup time per month

pricing.notes: Seat-based. Up to 30% yearly discount on core plans, 20% yearly on AI add-ons. Automations metered per month (5K Business, 250K Enterprise). AI usage metered in Super Credits with Super Fair Billing (rate adjustments passed through). Whole workspace must upgrade — cannot upgrade individual seats. 100% money-back guarantee. Image generation subject to fair use policy.

SaaS outfit ClickUp promises seven-figure salaries for survivors of 22% purge
